Usage: gs branch (b) diff (di) [flags]

Show diff between a branch and its base

Shows the diff between a branch and its base branch in the stack. This is
equivalent to running 'git diff base...branch' where base is the branch below
this one. Use --branch to target a different branch.

Flags:
  --branch=NAME    Branch to diff

Global Flags:
  -h, --help           Show help for the command
      --version        Print version information and quit
  -v, --verbose        Enable verbose output ($GIT_SPICE_VERBOSE)
  -C, --dir=DIR        Change to DIR before doing anything
      --[no-]prompt    Whether to prompt for missing information
